problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
